metaData.Key Information: Each pack contains several biscuit-like cookies that are stuffed to the brim with creamy chocolate filling.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

metaData.Ingredients:
Wheat flour, Vegetable oil (Palm, Emulsifier (Polyglycerol esters of fatty acids)), Sugar, Cocoa
mass (7.4%), Whole milk powder, Cocoa powder (1.1.%), Seasoning [Maltodextrin, Hydrolysed
vegetable protein, Yoghurt powder (Skim milk powder, Whey powder, Milk fat), Flavour enhancers
(Disodium 5’-guanylate, Disodium 5’-inosinate)], Leavening agents (Ammonium bicarbonate,
Sodium bicarbonate), Emulsifiers (Sucrose esters of fatty acids, Soya lecithin), Salt, Malt extract
(Barley), Artificial flavourings (Vanilla, Chocolate, Butter, Milk). Yeast powder, Natural colouring
[Plain caramel (INS 150a)]. Contains permitted flavouring and colouring. Contains emulsifiers as
permitted food conditioner. Food additives derived from plant and synthetic origin. Vegetable oil
(Palm) is plant origin.
Allergens: Contains Wheat, Barley (Cereals containing gluten), Milk and Soya. Manufactured on
equipment that also processes products that contain Sesame.
metaData.Key Information: Each pack contains several biscuit-like cookies that are stuffed to the brim with creamy double chocolate filling.
metaData.SAP Product Name: MEIJI HELLO PANDA BISCUITS - DOUBLE CHOCOLATE 234G
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

metaData.Ingredients:
Ingredient List: Semi-Chocolate I [Sugar, Processed Oil Ⅰ(Palm Oil, Sunflower Oil, Lecithin (E322), D-Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed) (E306)), Cocoa Preparation(Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass), Cocoa Mass, Lactose, Processed Oil Ⅱ(Sunflower Oil, Palm Oil, Lecithin (E322), D-Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed) (E306)), Almond Powder, Lecithin (E322), Sucrose Esters Of Fatty Acids (E473), Glycerin Esters Of Fatty Acids(Pgpr;E476), Artificial Flavor(Vanilla)], Wheat Flour, Almond, Semi-Chocolate Ⅱ[Sugar, Cocoa Preparation(Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass), Processed Oil Ⅰ(Palm Oil, Sunflower Oil, Lecithin (E322), D- Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed) (E306)), Cocoa Mass, Lactose, Processed Oil Ii (Sunflower Oil, Palm Oil, Lecithin (E322), D- Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed) (E306)), Almond Powder, Lecithin (E322), Sucrose Esters Of Fatty Acids (E473), Glycerin Esters Of Fatty Acids(Pgpr;E476), Artificial Flavor(Vanilla), Peanut Powder], Sugar, Palm Shortening [Palm Oil, Palm Olein Oil, D-Tocopherol Concentrate(Mixed) (E306)], Whole Milk Powder, Processed Butter [Milk Cream, Coconut Oil], Corn Starch, Malt Extract, Grain Products [Whole Meal, Nonglutinous Rice, Glutinous Rice], Acidity Regulator [Sodium Phosphate(Tribasic) (E339Iii), Ammonium Bicarbonate (E503Ii), Sodium Bicarbonate (E500Ii)], Salt, High Fructose Corn Syrup, Artificial Flavors [Perm Bread Flavor, Vanilla Flavor], Enzyme Preparation [Glycerin (E422), Water, Papaya Extract, Sodium Metabisulfite (E223)], Yeast [Yeast, Sorbitan Monostearate (E491)]
Allergy Information: Cereals Containing Gluten (Wheat, Barley), Tree Nut(Almond, Coconut), Milk, Soybean, Peanut
Cross Contamination: Beef, Egg, Sulfites
metaData.Key Information:
• Crunchy biscuit sticks coated with rich chocolate and almond bits
• It is 4 packs of our bestselling flavours in one octagon-shaped box!
• It is perfect for sharing or keeping all to yourself. Plus, it is more value-for-money.
